---
title: "disassembly of mpo"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# disassembly of mpo

## basic test

Give a case of SWAP operator.

```{julia}
# settings 
using RandomMeas
N = 8
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
```

```{julia}
# local swap op generator 
function create_local_swap_op(bitsnum::Int64, localsites::Vector{Int64}, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    ops = MPO[]
    site1 = localsites[1]
    site2 = localsites[2]
    opstrbases = ["I", "X", "Y", "Z"]
    for basesindex = 1:4
        opstrbase = opstrbases[basesindex]
        opstrs = ["I" for _ in 1:bitsnum]
        opstrs[site1], opstrs[site2] = opstrbase, opstrbase
        op = MPO(ComplexF64, siteindices, opstrs)
        push!(ops, op)
    end
    return local_swap_op = sum(ops) / 2
end
local_swap_op = create_local_swap_op(N, [1, 3], site_indices);
linkdims(local_swap_op)
```

```{julia}
# overall swap op 
function create_overall_swap_op(bitsnum::Int64, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    @assert iszero(bitsnum % 2) "bitsnum must be 2k, k ∈ ℕ" # contrain
    pairsnum = bitsnum ÷ 2
    opstrs = ["I" for _ in 1:bitsnum]
    op = MPO(ComplexF64, siteindices, opstrs)
    for pairsite = 1:pairsnum
        site1 = pairsite
        site2 = bitsnum - site1 + 1
        sites = [site1, site2]
        local_swap_op = create_local_swap_op(bitsnum, sites, siteindices)
        op = apply(local_swap_op, op)
    end
    return op
end
overall_op = create_overall_swap_op(N, site_indices); 
linkdims(overall_op) # NOTE: the result is not fixed...
```


```{julia}
# factorized swap op (error method)
function create_factorized_swap_op(bitsnum::Int64, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    @assert iszero(bitsnum % 2) "bitsnum must be 2k, k ∈ ℕ" # contrain
    pairsnum = bitsnum ÷ 2 # the first local swap operator
    firstsites = [1, bitsnum]
    firstindices = [siteindices[i] for i in firstsites]
    op = create_local_swap_op(2, [1, 2], firstindices)
    for pairsite = 2:pairsnum
        site1 = pairsite
        site2 = bitsnum - site1 + 1
        sites = [site1, site2]
        indices = [siteindices[i] for i in sites]
        local_swap_op = create_local_swap_op(2, [1, 2], indices)
        op = apply(local_swap_op, op)
    end
    return op
end
factorized_op = create_factorized_swap_op(N, site_indices); # NOTE: error, 在 ITensorMPS 这个层面，两个完全不同 site 集合的 MPO 不能直接用 apply 外积成一个新的更大 MPO。
linkdims(factorized_op)
```


```{julia}
# overall swap op 
function create_overall_swap_op2(bitsnum::Int64, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    @assert iszero(bitsnum % 2) "bitsnum must be 2k, k ∈ ℕ" # contrain
    pairsnum = bitsnum ÷ 2
    opstrs = ["I" for _ in 1:bitsnum]
    op = MPO(ComplexF64, siteindices, opstrs)
    for pairsite = 1:pairsnum
        site1 = 2 * pairsite - 1
        site2 = 2 * pairsite
        sites = [site1, site2]
        local_swap_op = create_local_swap_op(bitsnum, sites, siteindices)
        op = apply(local_swap_op, op)
    end
    return op
end
overall_op = create_overall_swap_op2(N, site_indices); 
linkdims(overall_op)
```

## conclusion

* General situation: 对于需要重排希尔伯特空间order的优化ITensors还是需要手动排序. 
* Classical shadow: Or calculate the expectation of local operator then product(Only could be used in Classical shadow).
